jsxMultiplePragmas.tsx(4,18): error TS7026: JSX element implicitly has type 'any' because no interface 'JSX.IntrinsicElements' exists.


==== jsxMultiplePragmas.tsx (1 errors) ====
    /** @jsx h */
    /** @jsx g */
    declare const h: any, g: any;
    export const x = <div/>;
                     ~~~~~~
!!! error TS7026: JSX element implicitly has type 'any' because no interface 'JSX.IntrinsicElements' exists.
